subject: Frieza's army soldiers in flight — multiple armored alien soldiers flying through the sky with Frieza's ship in background
description: A wide scene showing a large number of armored soldiers flying through the air in formation, rendered in a bright, open sky setting. The figures are small relative to the frame, suggesting a mass-deployment or call-to-arms scene. In the background, a large rounded spacecraft hovers — consistent with Frieza Force aesthetics. The card uses a wide-shot composition to emphasize scale and the organized, militaristic nature of the force being summoned.
foreground: Multiple small armored flying soldiers in formation
background: Open sky with large rounded spacecraft visible, bright daylight atmosphere
